summary: Frontend testing for SERVICES tab pulse feature and Quick Actions. P0 Issue 6 (Quick Actions) PASSED. P0 Issue 1 (SERVICES tab pulse) FAILED - state propagation bug. P1 Issue 3 (Auto-switch pillar) PASSED.

ui_bugs.issue: SERVICES tab does NOT pulse when AI creates service ticket - servicesPulse state is set to true via setServicesPulse(true) but the prop is NOT being received by MiraUnifiedHeader component

integration_issues.flow: SERVICES tab pulse after ticket creation
integration_issues.issue: Console shows '[SOULFUL] Highlighting tab: services' and setServicesPulse(true) is called in useChatSubmit.js, but MiraUnifiedHeader does NOT receive servicesPulse=true. The services tab class shows 'mira-os-tab  ' without 'pulse' class. This appears to be a React state propagation issue.

action_items: P0 HIGH PRIORITY: Fix SERVICES tab pulse - The state setServicesPulse(true) is being called but MiraUnifiedHeader is NOT receiving the updated prop value. Need to verify the prop is correctly passed from MiraDemoPage.jsx line 3831 to MiraUnifiedHeader.jsx line 270
Check if memo() wrapper on MiraUnifiedHeader is preventing re-render when servicesPulse changes
Add console.log in MiraUnifiedHeader to debug if servicesPulse prop is ever true
Console shows 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error - this React warning may be related to the pulse state not working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: useChatSubmit.js lines 438-441: setServicesPulse(true) IS being called when highlight_tab === 'services'
MiraDemoPage.jsx line 3831: servicesPulse={servicesPulse} IS passed to MiraUnifiedHeader
MiraUnifiedHeader.jsx line 303-305: effectiveIconState calculation looks correct but servicesPulse appears to be false
Possible root cause: The MiraUnifiedHeader component may not be re-rendering when servicesPulse state changes in parent
Console shows repeated 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error - investigate infinite re-render loop
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Issue 6 (Quick Actions in SERVICES modal) is WORKING - clicking Grooming opens ServiceRequestBuilder modal correctly. P0 Issue 1 (SERVICES tab pulse) is NOT working - the setServicesPulse(true) is called but the component doesn't reflect the change. P1 Issue 3 (Auto-switch pillar) is WORKING - console shows '[SOULFUL] Auto-setting pillar from conversation: care'. The PICKS tab IS pulsing correctly with +1 badge, but SERVICES tab does NOT get the pulse class. Concierge confirmation banner IS appearing correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: P0 Issue 1 - SERVICES tab not pulsing after ticket creation
reproduction_steps: 2. Dismiss onboarding tooltip and Test Scenarios modal
3. Send chat message like 'book vet for Mojo' or 'book grooming for Mojo'
5. Observe SERVICES tab - it should have pink pulse animation but it doesn't
rca_of_the_issue.expected_behavior: SERVICES tab should glow/pulse with pink animation for 5 seconds when AI creates a service ticket
rca_of_the_issue.actual_behavior: SERVICES tab has class 'mira-os-tab  ' without 'pulse' class. Console shows '[SOULFUL] Highlighting tab: services' but no pulse animation appears
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_analysis: The setServicesPulse(true) function is called in useChatSubmit.js but the state update is NOT propagating to MiraUnifiedHeader component. The iconStates debug log shows 'services:ON(—)' instead of 'services:PULSE'. The PICKS tab pulse works correctly using a similar mechanism (miraPicks.willPulse), suggesting the issue is specific to the servicesPulse state prop.
rca_of_the_issue.potential_fix: 1. Verify servicesPulse state is actually changing by adding console.log in MiraDemoPage.jsx. 2. Check if MiraUnifiedHeader memo() is blocking re-renders. 3. Consider using iconStates mechanism for services pulse instead of separate servicesPulse prop.
